relationships: ber:Tom yerzef ɣer Ustṛalya akken ad iẓer kra seg yiqriben-is
ber:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken Tom ad yili mazal-it deg Ustṛalya
ber:Ad iliɣ deg Ustṛalya tagara n yimalas d-itteddun
ber:Aseggas ay d-yetteddun, ad mahleɣ deg Ustṛalya
ber:Tom ur yelli ara deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan﹖
ber:Tom yella deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan﹖
ber:Llant aṭas n tɣawsiwin ara yexdem yiwen deg Ustṛalya
ber:Tom yella deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan
